nasb.text: The steadfast of mind You will keep in perfect peace, Because he trusts in You.

esv.text: You keep him in perfect peace whose mind is stayed on you, because he trusts in you.

cnv.text: 專心倚靠你的，你必保護他一切平安， 因為他倚靠你。

ccb.text: 你使坚信不移的人全然平安， 因为他们信靠你。

csbs.text: 那靠着你心意坚定的， 你会守护他完全平安， 因为他依靠你。
